# True positive secret samples — patterns that SHOULD be blocked by secret-scan.sh
# One pattern per line. These represent real-looking secrets (not real credentials).

AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE
AKIAI44QH8DHBEXAMPLE
-----BEGIN RSA PRIVATE KEY-----
-----BEGIN OPENSSH PRIVATE KEY-----
eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJ0ZXN0In0.SflKxwRJSMeKKF2QT4fwpMeJf36POk6yJV_adQssw5c
